compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Any 1000W HPS ballast, any 630W CMH ballast, any 600W MH ballast (120V or 240V)
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: NEMA 5-15 / NEMA 6-15 / X-Plug outlet (120V or 240V selectable)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off control only via 120V trigger cord from external timer or environmental controller. No dimming. 8 outlets, 1000W per outlet, 60A total relay (two 30A relays). X-style outlets support both 120V and 240V ballasts. All major HID brands compatible. Upgraded terminal blocks included.
